purpose: Portable Colab/Kaggle/local workbench for David to edit DMPLA/DMLPA architectures and compare discrete-action learners under the exact Program O-R physics.

physics.action_space: Discrete(4): allocate 0,1,2,3 of the next three batch rights to P_C

seed_custody.claim: All 949-series outputs are exploratory and burned on creation.

model_surface.scientific_reference: RecurrentPPO MlpLstmPolicy with the frozen Program O-R architecture and hyperparameters; notebook runs remain exploratory 949-series experiments.
model_surface.custom_mode: David may replace the neural architecture and training loop while retaining the locked environment, information boundary, seed namespace, and common evaluator.
model_surface.standard_sb3_sac_forbidden_reason: Stable-Baselines3 SAC requires a continuous Box action space; Program O-R is Discrete(4).

mandatory_development_checks: complete 65,536 open-loop and ten-classical-family comparison in all three cells
comparator selected by family mean across tapes, never by per-tape maximum
recurrent hidden state retained across the eight decisions
claim_boundary: A workbench win selects at most one candidate architecture for a later preregistered experiment. It cannot reinterpret Program O, O-R, or authorize Paper 2/Paper 3.
